nodes.title: Save Session
nodes.description: POST /api/storage/session with {agentId, data}. Persists agent session to disk. Data includes: branchName, worktreePath, tmuxSession, note, createdAt. Returns {saved: true}.

nodes.title: Load Session
nodes.description: GET /api/storage/session/:agentId. Returns {agentId, branchName, worktreePath, tmuxSession, note, createdAt}. Returns 404 if session not found.

nodes.title: List Sessions
nodes.description: GET /api/storage/sessions. Returns array of {agentId, branchName, worktreePath, lastUpdated}. Lists all saved sessions. Used for session restoration on startup.

nodes.title: Delete Session
nodes.description: DELETE /api/storage/session/:agentId. Deletes session file from disk. Returns {deleted: true}. No error if not exists.

nodes.title: Restore Sessions
nodes.description: On app startup. Loads all saved sessions, reconnects to tmux sessions if still running. Restores agent list to previous state.
